ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version and its features */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., in training, completed, deprecated) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the training process in seconds */,
  "model_size" TEXT /* Size of the model in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round or iteration number of the training process */,
  "acc_train" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the training dataset */,
  "acc_test" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test dataset */,
  "loss_train" REAL /* Loss of the model on the training dataset */,
  "loss_test" REAL /* Loss of the model on the test dataset */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during the specific training round */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during the specific training round */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training round */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken for the specific training round in seconds */,
  "validation_acc" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the validation dataset */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Loss of the model on the validation dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter and its impact */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., optimizer, regularization) */,
  "param_units" TEXT /* Units of the hyperparameter (e.g., seconds, batches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., training, test) */,
  "source_path" TEXT /* Path to the data source */,
  "source_size" TEXT /* Size of the data source in bytes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "checkpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_path" TEXT /* Path to the checkpoint */,
  "checkpoint_size" TEXT /* Size of the checkpoint in bytes */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the checkpoint */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding performance metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the checkpoint was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_checkpoints_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_checkpoints_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES training_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "final_acc_train" REAL /* Final accuracy of the model on the training dataset */,
  "final_acc_test" REAL /* Final accuracy of the model on the test dataset */,
  "final_loss_train" REAL /* Final loss of the model on the training dataset */,
  "final_loss_test" REAL /* Final loss of the model on the test dataset */,
  "final_validation_acc" REAL /* Final accuracy of the model on the validation dataset */,
  "final_validation_loss" REAL /* Final loss of the model on the validation dataset */,
  "training_completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the final model */,
  "model_size" TEXT /* Size of the final model in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
